title: 1990-1994 Lexus LS400 Noise From Front Suspension, Front Sway Bar Stabilizer Bar Bushing Replacement
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to front sway bar bushing removal and installation procedure on the LS400 models to repair for creaking/squeaking/groaning noise coming from the front suspension over bumps. The SC400 and Celsior are done in a similar way.

items.name: Genuine Lexus/Toyota sway bar bushings for 1990-1992 models
